@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await(loadUser)∧same_order(missing_id,db.findUser,not_found,audit.log,cache.set)∧one_next(err)
P: db_err->next(err)∧missing_id_before_db∧not_found_before_audit∧await(audit.log)∧await(cache.set)
V: minimal_async_await∧promisify
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await(loadUser) and same validation order(missing_id, db.findUser, not_found, audit.log, cache.set) and one_next(err).
Plan: db_err then next(err) and missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and await(audit.log) and await(cache.set).
Verify: minimal async/await migration and promisify.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(createInvoice)
C: async_await(createInvoice)∧minimal_async_await(createInvoice)
P: validate_input(createInvoice)→db.createInvoice(createInvoice)→await(audit.log)→queue.publish(createInvoice)→res.json(createInvoice)
V: missing_id_before_db(createInvoice)∧same_order(createInvoice)
R: !promisify(db.findUser)∧db_err
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(createInvoice).
Constraints: async/await(createInvoice) and minimal async/await migration(createInvoice).
Plan: validate_input(createInvoice) then db.createInvoice(createInvoice) then await(audit.log) then queue.publish(createInvoice) then res.json(createInvoice).
Verify: missing id check before database call(createInvoice) and same validation order(createInvoice).
Risk: high-risk promisify(db.findUser) and db_err.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
